# Role Onboarding Checklist

## Purpose
Help teams bring a new team member or newly assigned role up to speed quickly and consistently. Complete this checklist within the first week of a new role assignment.

## When to use
- When adding a new team member to an active project.
- When an existing team member takes on a new or expanded role.
- When transitioning a role from one person to another mid-project.

---

## Checklist

### 1. Project Orientation
- [ ] Read the Project One-pager (problem statement, goals, success metrics)
- [ ] Review the current roadmap and release plan
- [ ] Understand the project lifecycle phase (initiation / planning / execution / release / close)
- [ ] Review the most recent status report or weekly update

### 2. Access & Accounts
- [ ] GitHub repository access granted (correct permission level)
- [ ] Project board access granted (e.g., GitHub Projects)
- [ ] Communication channels joined (Slack workspace/channels, mailing lists)
- [ ] CI/CD and deployment tooling access (if applicable to role)
- [ ] Documentation/wiki access granted
- [ ] Cloud environment or infrastructure access (if applicable — follow least-privilege policy)

### 3. Key Artifacts Review
- [ ] Roles & Personas doc reviewed: [octoacme-roles-and-personas.md](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)
- [ ] RACI matrix reviewed and role column understood: [roles-and-personas-matrix.md](../roles-and-personas-matrix.md)
- [ ] Risk Register reviewed and active risks noted
- [ ] Decision log reviewed for recent decisions: [decision-log-template.md](./decision-log-template.md)
- [ ] Definition of Done and acceptance criteria standards reviewed

### 4. Communication Channels
- [ ] Introduced to the team in standups or async channel
- [ ] Added to regular meeting invites (standup, planning, demos, retrospectives)
- [ ] Primary contacts identified (see **Primary Contacts** section below)
- [ ] Escalation path understood (Team → PM → Product Lead → Sponsor)

### 5. Immediate Tasks
- [ ] First task or deliverable identified and assigned in project board
- [ ] Paired or shadowed with an existing team member for first 1–3 days (if applicable)
- [ ] Any required training or policy acknowledgments completed (e.g., security policies)
- [ ] Initial 1:1 scheduled with PM or direct lead

### 6. Primary Contacts

| Role | Name | Contact |
|------|------|---------|
| Project Manager (PM) | | |
| Product Manager (PdM) | | |
| Tech Lead / Developer Lead | | |
| QA Lead | | |
| DevOps Contact | | |
| Other (specify) | | |

---

## Sample Entry

**New team member:** Jordan Lee  
**Role:** UX Designer  
**Project:** OctoAcme Portal Redesign  
**Onboarding date:** 2025-06-01  

Completed items:
- [x] Project One-pager reviewed
- [x] GitHub and Figma access granted
- [x] RACI matrix reviewed — UX Designer column noted
- [x] Introduced in Monday standup
- [ ] First design task assigned (in progress)
